lines: +jsonnet rules: bound recursion in both rule loading and evaluation so a
+malicious rule can no longer hang semgrep via mutually-recursive `import`s
+or runtime function calls that recurse forever.
+  (* Canonical paths of files currently being desugared. Used to detect
+     mutually-recursive imports (e.g. a.jsonnet imports b.jsonnet which
+     imports a.jsonnet) and reject them, otherwise desugar would loop
+     until the OCaml stack overflows.  ref: ENGINE-2727.
* The cache_file is used to ensure referencial transparency (see the spec
let final_path = sandbox (env.base // Fpath.v str) in
+                (spf "circular import detected: %s is already being desugared"
-            let env = { env with base = Fpath_.dirname final_path } in
(* TODO? let the import callback adjust base? *)
@@ -541,8 +558,22 @@ let desugar_expr_profiled env e = desugar_expr env e [@@profiling]
let base = Filename.dirname !!file |> Unix.realpath |> Fpath.v in
+  (* Seed the cycle-detector with the entry-point file (canonicalized) so
+     that any import path which transitively resolves back to it is caught.
+     We use the realpath of the entry file when it exists; otherwise the
+     program AST was supplied in-memory and the entry can't appear as an
-    { within_an_object = false; base; import_root = base; import_callback }
+(* limit recursion depth so a rule can't hang the evaluator with deep recursion.
+   500 matches upstream Google jsonnet's default --max-stack value.
+      (spf "max recursion depth exceeded (%d); jsonnet eval aborted"
Local_id_map.fold (fun k v acc -> Local_id_map.add k v acc) locals start
| v -> error largs (spf "not a function: %s" (sv v))
let locals = Local_id_map.add (V.LId (fst id)) ei env.locals in
-      (eval_expr { env with depth = env.depth + 1; locals } f_body, env)
+      (eval_expr { env with depth; locals } f_body, env)
+(* Each fixture in [dir] is a malicious jsonnet program designed to hang
+   semgrep via unbounded recursion (either runtime function calls caught
+   by the eval-depth limit, or circular imports caught by the desugar
+   cycle detector). Either failure path is acceptable; the test fails
+   only if neither check fires.  ref: ENGINE-2727.
+            let core = Desugar_jsonnet.desugar_program file ast in
+            Alcotest.(fail "DoS fixture should have hit a recursion limit")
